name: Badger Meter BEACON Advanced Metering Analytics API
what_it_does: Badger Meter BEACON Advanced Metering Analytics (AMA) REST API for cellular-connected water meter data management. Enables AI agents to manage water meter read collection and validation from BEACON cellular AMI network for utility billing, handle interval consumption data and leak analytics for non-revenue water management, access remote meter programming and configuration for AMI network operations, retrieve water quality and pressure monitoring data from BEACON-connected devices, manage customer portal integration and usage alerts for utility customer engagement, handle water meter health diagnostics and network status for infrastructure management, access usage analytics and conservation program support data, retrieve billing-ready meter read exports for CIS integration, manage meter endpoint commissioning and cellular provisioning, and integrate BEACON meter data with utility billing, CIS, and GIS platforms.
use_cases: Collecting cellular water meter reads from utility billing agents
Detecting leaks from non-revenue water agents
Programming meters from AMI network management agents
Integrating meter data with utility billing systems
not_for: Electric or gas utilities without water meter focus
Non-utility applications without water metering context
Legacy meter reading without cellular AMI infrastructure
best_when: A water utility using Badger Meter BEACON cellular AMI wants AI agents to automate meter data collection, leak detection, billing integration, and remote meter management.
avoid_when: INFRASTRUCTURE RISK: Badger Meter BEACON AMI automation involves critical water infrastructure — automated mass meter programming or network configuration changes require safety testing before deployment. BEACON cellular metering requires cellular network coverage; automated meter reading in coverage gaps requires hybrid read strategies. Badger Meter BEACON API is partner-facing; requires Badger Meter deployment relationship for access.

auth.notes: Badger Meter BEACON uses OAuth 2.0. Webhooks for metering events. REST API with JSON. Milwaukee, Wisconsin HQ. Public (BMI NYSE). Founded 1905. 1,600+ water utility customers. BEACON Advanced Metering Analytics is cloud-based cellular AMI platform. Badger Meter Orion cellular meter endpoints. Strong in US municipal water utilities, especially 2,000-20,000 customer range. Competes with Sensus, Itron, and Neptune for water AMI.

pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-endpoint subscription; cellular data included
pricing.notes: Milwaukee. Badger Meter (BMI NYSE). Founded 1905. 1,600+ utility customers. BEACON cellular cloud AMI. Strong in mid-size US water utilities. Competes with Sensus, Itron, and Neptune for water AMI.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per utility

known_agent_gotchas: INFRASTRUCTURE RISK: BEACON AMI is critical water infrastructure; automated mass meter configuration changes require staged deployment with rollback capability
Cellular coverage dependency — BEACON cellular meters require cellular coverage for real-time reads; automated workflows must handle coverage gaps and manual read fallback
America's Water Infrastructure Act — water utility cyber security regulations increasing; automated AMI network access requires cyber security documentation
Meter commissioning sequence — new cellular meter activation requires provisioning sequence through BEACON; automated commissioning without proper sequence creates billing read failures
Leak alert thresholds — automated leak detection alerts are configurable per meter; alert tuning required to reduce false positives in seasonal and irrigation-heavy service areas
Water privacy regulations — some states have water consumption data privacy protections; verify state requirements before automated data sharing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Water AMI. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Water utility meter data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Water AMI. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Utility meter and consumption data.
